title: Sus Blocks
body:
This resource pack is a modification of [Sus Sand](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sus-sand) - but with more blocks

![Infested stone marked with an imposter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75db5a3c2a788fc9749788067a715752a3b90938.png)

![Infested deepslate marked with an imposter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ecec24716b0bd75db0a4051b7a50535ec001d4b.png)

![Powdered snow marked with an imposter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24b57d5f765af9f2faae8054c1895825a137fef9.png)
